title: The Refugee's Haven.
content:
("Vous voil� dans la froide Angleterre.")

    [Bk. III. xlvii., Jersey, Sept. 19, 1854.]


    You may doubt I find comfort in England
    But, there, 'tis a refuge from dangers!
    Where a Cromwell dictated to Milton,
    Republicans ne'er can be strangers!
meaning:
"The Refugee's Haven." is a quintessential example of Victor-Marie Hugo's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
